meta.title: AI Dev 25 Recap: Code, Learn, Connect
meta.description:
On Pi Day, 2025, we were in the heart of AI Dev 25, surrounded by developers, researchers, and industry leaders, all coming together to push the boundaries of AI.

Hosted by DeepLearning.AI and Andrew Ng, the event featured hands-on workshops, insightful keynotes, and panel discussions with the top minds in AI. This recap video captures the energy, ideas, and breakthroughs that made the day unforgettable.

Whether you attended in person or missed out, relive the experience and get inspired by the moments that shaped AI Dev 25.

See you next time!
